projects.name: Professional Statement
details: Within a team, I am willing to take on any role necessary to ensure the project's success.

projects.name: Intelligent AI Agent System
details: Developed multi-agent system based on AutoGen framework with Agentic AI principles
Implemented dedicated model for each agent to maintain true agent autonomy and specialization
Enhanced inter-agent communication using reinforcement learning for optimal information sharing
Implemented RAG-based knowledge retrieval enhancement with dynamic memory management
Optimized information retrieval using vector databases for context-aware responses
Designed comprehensive prompt engineering system with agent-specific optimization
Built reward mechanisms to encourage collaborative problem-solving between agents

achievement.text: Internal R&D project: Developed a proprietary multi-agent system achieving 85% accuracy in collaborative decision-making with 40% improvement in information sharing efficiency

projects.technicalHighlights: Agentic AI, AutoGen, RAG, Vector Databases, Reinforcement Learning, LLM, Multi-agent Systems, Collaborative AI, Prompt Engineering, Python

projects.name: Virtual Home Classroom
details: (Ongoing Development - Personal team project with no deadline, continuously evolving)
Developed digital human teacher using Unreal Engine 5 with fine-tuned LLaMA 3 for educational purposes
Implemented adaptive learning system that adjusts teaching pace based on children's comprehension levels
Created progressive learning paths with positive guidance mechanisms
Built comprehensive curriculum covering all subjects in Chinese education system
Designed scalable architecture aiming to revolutionize traditional teaching methods

achievement.text: Successfully tested with 100 students, receiving positive feedback on the adaptive learning approach

projects.technicalHighlights: LLaMA 3, Unreal Engine 5, Digital Human, LLM Fine-tuning, Adaptive Learning Algorithms, Curriculum Design

projects.name: Air Spring Quality Inspection System
details: Developed high-precision computer vision system for air spring bellows inspection
Implemented multi-layer reinforcement cords detection algorithm with sub-millimeter accuracy
Designed three-tier validation system for inner layer, outer layer, and inter-layer spacing verification
Integrated with industrial PLC for automated production line control
Optimized image processing for ultra-high-definition camera (3 FPS)

achievement.text: Achieved 99.5% detection accuracy with zero false negatives in production environment

projects.technicalHighlights: Computer Vision, Deep Learning, PLC Integration, High-Speed Image Processing, Industrial Automation, Python, C++

projects.name: Monocular Distance Measurement System
details: Developed safety-critical computer vision system to prevent electrical injuries from insulators
Evolved system from basic pixel-to-physical distance mapping to sophisticated NeRF-based 3D reconstruction
Implemented Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) to generate high-fidelity 3D scene representation from single-view images
Achieved accurate distance calculation through neural implicit 3D scene representation
Built mobile-based warning system for electrical workers' safety
Designed robust detection algorithm for various lighting conditions
Integrated real-time alert system for dangerous proximity

achievement.text: Deployed in multiple power stations with zero electrical injury incidents reported

projects.technicalHighlights: NeRF (Neural Radiance Fields), 3D Scene Reconstruction, Computer Vision, Mobile Development, Real-time Processing, Safety Systems, Python, OpenCV

projects.name: Brain-Computer Interface Data Processing Platform

achievement.text: Improved signal processing accuracy by 40% and reduced latency by 50%

projects.technicalHighlights: Signal Processing, Reinforcement Learning, Flask, Vue.js, Docker, Python, Real-time Data Processing

personalStatement:
I am an optimistic person who can handle work pressure far beyond what most people can endure.

In my work, I always focus on issues rather than individuals, never harbor suspicions about others, and regardless of what setbacks I encounter, I never project my emotions onto those around me.

I possess strong social skills while being equally comfortable working independently. I maintain an unwavering focus on the bright, hopeful future that technology promises.
